structured_payload_candidate.title: Endpoints as a Function of Zone Group Mode
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Endpoints as a Function of Zone Group Mode
structured_payload_candidate.summary: The active setpoints (cooling maximum, minimum, heating maximum) vary based on the Zone Group operating mode as defined in Table 5.13.4.
configurable_values: Occupied: Cooling maximum = Vcool-max, Minimum = Vmin, Heating maximum = Vheat-max
Cooldown: Cooling maximum = Vcool-max, Minimum = 0, Heating maximum = 0
Setup: Cooling maximum = Vcool-max, Minimum = 0, Heating maximum = 0
Warmup: Cooling maximum = 0, Minimum = 0, Heating maximum = Vheat-max
Setback: Cooling maximum = 0, Minimum = 0, Heating maximum = Vheat-max
Unoccupied: Cooling maximum = 0, Minimum = 0, Heating maximum = 0
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
Active endpoints used in the control logic depicted in Figure 5.13.5 shall vary depending on the mode of the Zone Group the zone is a part of (see Table 5.13.4).
Table 5.13.4 Endpoints as a Function of Zone Group Mode
Setpoint  Occupied  Cooldown  Setup  Warmup  Setback  Unoccupied
Cooling maximum  Vcool-max Vcool-max Vcool-max 0 0 0
Minimum  Vmin*  0 0 0 0 0
Heating maximum  Vheat-max 0 0 Vheat-max Vheat-max 0

evidence_quote:
Active endpoints used in the control logic depicted in Figure 5.13.5 shall vary depending on the mode of the Zone Group the zone is a part of (see Table 5.13.4).
Table 5.13.4 Endpoints as a Function of Zone Group Mode
Setpoint  Occupied  Cooldown  Setup  Warmup  Setback  Unoccupied
Cooling maximum  Vcool-max Vcool-max Vcool-max 0 0 0
Minimum  Vmin*  0 0 0 0 0
Heating maximum  Vheat-max 0 0 Vheat-max Vheat-max 0

structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling Mode Cold Duct Airflow Reset
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When the zone is in cooling mode, the cooling loop resets the active cold duct airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint, and the cold duct damper is modulated to maintain that airflow.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Reset active cold duct airflow setpoint from minimum endpoint to cooling maximum endpoint; modulate cold duct damper to maintain measured cold duct airflow at setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. When the Zone State is cooling, the cooling-loop output shall reset the active cold duct airflow setpoint from minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint. The cold duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured cold duct airflow at the active cold duct airflow setpoint.

evidence_quote: a. When the Zone State is cooling, the cooling-loop output shall reset the active cold duct airflow setpoint from minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint. The cold duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured cold duct airflow at the active cold duct airflow setpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling Mode Cold Airflow Limitation when Supply Air Warmer than Room
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If the cold duct supply air temperature exceeds room temperature, the active cold duct airflow setpoint is limited to no higher than the minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is cooling and cold duct supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Active cold duct airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: 1. If cold duct supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active cold duct airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.

evidence_quote: 1. If cold duct supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active cold duct airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Deadband Mode Cold and Hot Damper Control
structured_payload_candidate.summary: In deadband, the active cold duct airflow setpoint is the minimum endpoint; the cold damper maintains that airflow, and the hot duct damper is closed.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Active cold duct airflow setpoint = minimum endpoint; modulate cold duct damper to maintain that airflow; close hot duct damper.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: b. When the Zone State is deadband, the active cold duct airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint. The cold duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured cold duct airflow at the active cold duct airflow setpoint. The hot duct damper shall be closed.

evidence_quote: b. When the Zone State is deadband, the active cold duct airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint. The cold duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured cold duct airflow at the active cold duct airflow setpoint. The hot duct damper shall be closed.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Heating Mode Hot and Cold Damper Control
structured_payload_candidate.summary: In heating mode, the heating loop output directly positions the hot duct damper, and the cold duct damper modulates to maintain discharge airflow at the minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Map Heating Loop output to hot duct damper position; modulate cold duct damper to maintain measured discharge airflow at minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: c. When the Zone State is heating, the Heating Loop output shall be mapped to the hot duct damper position. The cold duct damper is modulated to maintain measured discharge airflow at the minimum endpoint.

evidence_quote: c. When the Zone State is heating, the Heating Loop output shall be mapped to the hot duct damper position. The cold duct damper is modulated to maintain measured discharge airflow at the minimum endpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Heating Mode Hot Damper Close when Supply Air Colder than Room
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If the hot duct supply air temperature is less than room temperature, the hot duct damper shall be closed.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is heating and hot duct supply air temperature from the air handler is less than room temperature.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: 1. If hot duct supply air temperature from the air handler is less than room temperature, the hot duct damper shall be closed.

evidence_quote: 1. If hot duct supply air temperature from the air handler is less than room temperature, the hot duct damper shall be closed.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Heating Mode Maximum Hot Duct Airflow Limiting Loop
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Maximum hot duct airflow is limited by a reverse-acting P-only loop that uses the heating maximum endpoint as setpoint and outputs a maximum hot duct damper position from 0% to 100%.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: A reverse-acting P-only loop limits maximum hot duct damper position to enforce Vheat-max; its output ranges from 0% to 100%.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: 2. Maximum hot duct airflow shall be limited by a reverse-acting P-only loop whose setpoint is the heating maximum endpoint and whose output is the maximum hot duct damper position ranging from 0% to 100%.

evidence_quote: 2. Maximum hot duct airflow shall be limited by a reverse-acting P-only loop whose setpoint is the heating maximum endpoint and whose output is the maximum hot duct damper position ranging from 0% to 100%.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Override Close Heating Damper if Heating AHU Not Proven
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If the heating air handler is not proven ON, the heating damper shall be closed.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Heating air handler is not proven ON.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. If heating air handler is not proven ON, the heating damper shall be closed.

evidence_quote: a. If heating air handler is not proven ON, the heating damper shall be closed.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Override Close Cooling Damper if Cooling AHU Not Proven
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If the cooling air handler is not proven ON, the cooling damper shall be closed.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Cooling air handler is not proven ON.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: b. If cooling air handler is not proven ON, the cooling damper shall be closed.

evidence_quote: b. If cooling air handler is not proven ON, the cooling damper shall be closed.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low Airflow Level 4 Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Generate a Level 4 alarm if measured airflow is below 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint > 0.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Measured airflow < 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes AND setpoint > 0.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Low airflow, possible damper or sensor issue.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. If the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.

evidence_quote: a. If the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low Airflow Level 3 Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Generate a Level 3 alarm if measured airflow is below 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint > 0.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Measured airflow < 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes AND setpoint > 0.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Severe low airflow, urgent attention required.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: b. If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 3 alarm.

evidence_quote: b. If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 3 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low Airflow Alarm Suppression for Non-Critical Zones
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Low airflow alarms are suppressed for zones with static pressure reset Importance-Multiplier of 0.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone Importance-Multiplier = 0 for static pressure reset T&R control loop.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: c. If a zone has an Importance-Multiplier of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1) for its static pressure reset T&R control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.

evidence_quote: c. If a zone has an Importance-Multiplier of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1) for its static pressure reset T&R control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Airflow Sensor Calibration Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If the fan is OFF and the airflow sensor reading exceeds 10% of max airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Fan OFF, and airflow sensor reading > max(10% of maximum airflow setpoint, 50 cfm) for 30 minutes.
configurable_values: Threshold based on transducer and A/D converter accuracy (should be determined as minimum accuracy)
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Possible airflow sensor drift or calibration error.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the fan serving the zone is OFF and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.

evidence_quote: If the fan serving the zone is OFF and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Leaking Damper Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If damper position is 0% and airflow reading exceeds 10% of cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while fan is ON, generate a Level 4 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Damper position = 0%, airflow > max(10% of cooling maximum airflow setpoint, 50 cfm) for 10 minutes, fan proven ON.
configurable_values: Threshold based on transducer and A/D converter accuracy (should be determined as minimum accuracy)
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Possible leaking damper or faulty actuator.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the damper position is 0%, and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while the fan serving the damper is proven ON, generate a Level 4 alarm.

evidence_quote: If the damper position is 0%, and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while the fan serving the damper is proven ON, generate a Level 4 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Airflow Alarm Threshold Determination
structured_payload_candidate.summary: The constant value thresholds (10% of maximum or 50 cfm) for airflow sensor calibration and leaking damper alarms should be set based on the minimum accuracy of the transducer and A/D converter combination.
configurable_values: Threshold = minimum accuracy of transducer and A/D converter combination
structured_payload_candidate.commissioning_check: Verify the thresholds are set to the minimum accuracy of the installed transducer and A/D converter.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: The constant value thresholds for the airflow sensor calibration and leaking damper alarms are a function of the transducer and A/D converter used to measure airflow. The value used should be determined as the minimum accuracy of the transducer and A/D converter combination.

evidence_quote: The constant value thresholds for the airflow sensor calibration and leaking damper alarms are a function of the transducer and A/D converter used to measure airflow. The value used should be determined as the minimum accuracy of the transducer and A/D converter combination.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Testing/Commissioning Overrides for Dual-Duct VAV Zone
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Provide software switches to force zone airflow setpoints and damper positions, and reset request-hours accumulators. Overrides interlock at the Zone Group level.
structured_payload_candidate.commissioning_check: Force airflow setpoints to 0, Vcool-max, Vmin, Vheat-max; force cooling/heating dampers full closed/open; reset request-hours accumulators. Interlocked to allow Zone Group level operation.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to
a. force zone airflow setpoint to zero,
b. force zone airflow setpoint to Vcool-max,
c. force zone airflow setpoint to Vmin,
d. force zone airflow setpoint to Vheat-max,
e. force cooling damper full closed/open,
f. force heating damper full closed/open, and
g. reset request-hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section).

evidence_quote:
Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to
a. force zone airflow setpoint to zero,
b. force zone airflow setpoint to Vcool-max,
c. force zone airflow setpoint to Vmin,
d. force zone airflow setpoint to Vheat-max,
e. force cooling damper full closed/open,
f. force heating damper full closed/open, and
g. reset request-hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section).
